You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Frankfurt
TO: Lisbon
BY: Plane
CLASS: Business
WHEN: On March 3

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Frankfurt
TO: Lisbon
BY: Plane
CLASS: Business
WHEN: On March 3

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Frankfurt
TO: Lisbon
BY: Plane
CLASS: Business
WHEN: On March 3

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: Ok.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: TRAVEL-AGENT: Which means of transportation do you prefer?
ANSWER: I prefer to travel by plane.
TRAVEL-AGENT: Where do you want to depart from?
ANSWER: I want to depart from Frankfurt.
TRAVEL-AGENT: What is your destination?
ANSWER: My destination is Lisbon.
TRAVEL-AGENT: What kind of class do you wish?
ANSWER: I would like to travel in business class.
ME: Please answer this question carefully. If I asked the travel agent where you want to go, would he or she know the answer? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

    *   Did I already tell the agent the destination? Yes, in the third turn.

    *   Since I already answered "My destination is Lisbon" to the travel agent's previous question, the agent possesses this information.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Frankfurt
TO: Lisbon
BY: Plane
CLASS: Business
WHEN: On March 3

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

ANSWER: I would like to travel in business class.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Frankfurt
TO: Lisbon
BY: Plane
CLASS: Business
WHEN: On March 3

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

TRAVEL-AGENT: What is your destination?
ANSWER: My destination is Lisbon.
TRAVEL-AGENT: What kind of class do you wish?
ANSWER: I would like to travel in business class.
ME:  Have you told the travel agent when you want to travel? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Frankfurt
TO: Lisbon
BY: Plane
CLASS: Business
WHEN: On March 3

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Frankfurt
TO: Lisbon
BY: Plane
CLASS: Business
WHEN: On March 3

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: Ok.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: TRAVEL-AGENT: Which means of transportation do you prefer?
ANSWER: I prefer to travel by plane.
TRAVEL-AGENT: Where do you want to depart from?
ANSWER: I want to depart from Frankfurt.
TRAVEL-AGENT: What is your destination?
ANSWER: My destination is Lisbon.
TRAVEL-AGENT: What kind of class do you wish?
ANSWER: I would like to travel in business class.
TRAVEL-AGENT: When does your trip begin?
ANSWER: My trip begins on March 3.
ME: Please answer this question carefully. If I asked the travel agent where you want to go, would he or she know the answer? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Frankfurt
TO: Lisbon
BY: Plane
CLASS: Business
WHEN: On March 3

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

ANSWER: I prefer to travel by plane.

TRAVEL-AGENT: What is your destination?
ANSWER: My destination is Lisbon.
TRAVEL-AGENT: What kind of class do you wish?
ANSWER: I would like to travel in business class.
TRAVEL-AGENT: When does your trip begin?
ANSWER: My trip begins on March 3.
ME:  Have you informed the travel agent about your class preference? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Frankfurt
TO: Lisbon
BY: Plane
CLASS: Business
WHEN: On March 3

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

ANSWER: I prefer to travel by plane.

TRAVEL-AGENT: What is your destination?
ANSWER: My destination is Lisbon.
TRAVEL-AGENT: What kind of class do you wish?
ANSWER: I would like to travel in business class.
TRAVEL-AGENT: When does your trip begin?
ANSWER: My trip begins on March 3.
ME:  Do you believe that the travel agent is aware of when you are travelling? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.
